sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72317" key="oi)kodespo/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκοδεσπότ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Astrol., <sense id="n72317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">predominance</tr_> of a planet, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).240</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
